privileged_info_summary: The task involves merging 4 sets of duplicate papers in a Zotero library. All metadata claims are verified as correct and refer to real, authoritative academic papers: (1) 'Attention Is All You Need' (Vaswani et al.) published in NeurIPS 30 with volume 30; (2) 'Deep Learning' (LeCun, Bengio, Hinton) published in Nature 521 with DOI 10.1038/nature14539; (3) 'A Mathematical Theory of Communication' (Shannon) published in Bell System Technical Journal Vol. 27 with pages 379-423; (4) 'Computing Machinery and Intelligence' (Turing) published in Mind 59 in year 1950. The task expects final state of 18 unique items with 4 items in trash (the merged duplicates). All field IDs are correctly mapped to Zotero 7 schema.
